subject: How do I reset my API key?
body: Hi, I rotated my password but I can't find where to regenerate my Acme Cloud API key. Can you point me to the right settings page? Thanks!

subject: URGENT: Production is down — 503 errors everywhere
body: Our entire Acme Cloud deployment is returning 503s as of 10 minutes ago. This is affecting all of our customers. We need help immediately.

subject: Double charged on my invoice this month
body: I was billed twice for my Acme Cloud Pro subscription on the June invoice. Order numbers 88123 and 88124 are identical. Please refund the duplicate.

subject: Feature idea: dark mode for the dashboard
body: Would love a dark mode option in the Acme Cloud dashboard. Not urgent, just a nice-to-have for late-night ops work.
